name: Vertex Pharmaceuticals
analysis: VRTX's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 8% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.3× the 20-day average) — real participation. Price has broken above the base high at $456.6800. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry $466.7900, stop $429.1650, target $579.6650 (3.00:1) — then trail it.
